description_long: This is a tall, dark wooden cabinet featuring a prominent crown molding at the top and a symmetrical design. The upper section consists of two open arch-topped compartments, each with two shelves, providing ample space for displaying or storing items. Below the shelving area, there are four spacious drawers arranged in two columns, each equipped with metal handles for easy access. The sides and back are solid, with the back panel extending the full height of the cabinet. The finish is a deep, rich brown, giving the piece a classic and elegant appearance suitable for urban interiors such as offices, lobbies, or upscale residential spaces. The overall construction appears sturdy and substantial, with a smooth, polished surface.
description: A tall, dark wood cabinet with open shelves above and four drawers below, featuring crown molding and metal handles. Its elegant, classic design is both functional and decorative.
description_view_0: Front view showing two open arched shelves above and four drawers with handles below.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the cabinet and the stepped profile of the crown molding.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a solid, flat back panel with no visible openings or features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the depth and crown molding profile seen in view 1.
